title: Setting Up an Admin Dashboard for Your Crypto Digital Store: What Actually Works When You Are in a Restricted Country — The Honest Version
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: A complete crypto store for digital products — no PayPal, no Stripe, no geographic restrictions. Built and running in one session.

content.text: Having a great digital product and being unable to collect payment is a frustrating experience many creators in restricted countries face, with platforms like PayPal and Stripe being inaccessible due to geographic restrictions, leaving them without a reliable way to sell their products, this is where crypto-native infrastructure comes in, providing a solution to this problem, with Unchained Commerce offering tools like the Core Shop Engine, a backend with automated delivery and payment verification, to help creators get paid
What You Are Actually Comparing

When setting up a digital store, you are comparing different payment processors and platforms, like NOWPayments, which offers a wide range of coins and no KYC requirements, to traditional platforms like Gumroad and Payhip, which often have restrictive policies and requirements, making it difficult for creators in certain countries to use them, and this is where crypto-native infrastructure shines, providing a more accessible and flexible solution

Traditional platforms like PayPal and Stripe often break down for creators in restricted countries due to their strict KYC requirements and geographic restrictions, making it impossible for them to collect payment, and even when they can, the fees and charges are often high, and the process is slow and cumbersome, which is why many creators are turning to crypto-native infrastructure, which offers a more reliable and efficient way to sell digital products

Crypto-native infrastructure, like the Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect, does things differently by providing a fully automated and decentralized way to sell digital products, with no KYC requirements and no need for a payment processor account, and with the ability to accept a wide range of coins, it offers more flexibility and accessibility to creators, and with real-time analytics and transaction logs, it provides a more transparent and secure way to manage sales
The key to success for creators in restricted countries is to find a payment solution that is accessible and reliable, and crypto-native infrastructure provides just that
